isolation.scope: Read-only visual validation for assigned assertions

assertions.title: Page background and theme colors match Uniswap dark mode

steps.action: Open / at 1440px viewport and capture full-page screenshot
steps.expected: Dark theme baseline is visually Uniswap-style
steps.observed: Page renders dark theme and layout correctly in screenshot

steps.action: Run computed-style checks for body/background and border tokens

steps.observed: Explore button color white/65, Line toggle white/38, scrollbar thumb rule background rgb(57,57,57)

evidence.consoleErrors: Repeated fetch errors: HTTP 429 Too Many Requests from localhost:3100 endpoints during session
evidence.network: Observed GET /market and GET /depth from http://localhost:3100; repeated 429 responses surfaced in console

assertions.title: All component text colors use Uniswap neutral tokens

steps.action: Capture page screenshot including nav, stats, table header, breadcrumb, and links
steps.expected: Neutral token usage visible across sections
steps.observed: All required sections rendered and visible for inspection

steps.action: Measure computed text colors on key labels/tabs/links
steps.expected: text-white/65 for secondary labels and text-white/38 for inactive muted toggles
steps.observed: Explore, Tokens, Market cap, table headers, Explorer/Website all compute to white/65; Line/1H/1W compute to white/38

evidence.consoleErrors: Repeated fetch errors: HTTP 429 Too Many Requests from localhost:3100 endpoints during session
evidence.network: GET /market and GET /depth requests observed while validating token detail sections

assertions.title: Swap widget matches Uniswap swap component exactly

steps.expected: Input sections min-h 120px+, amount input >=28px, CTA 56px tall at 17px
steps.observed: Input containers minHeight=120px; amount input fontSize=28px; Connect Wallet button box=342x56 and font=17px

steps.action: Validate hover/focus border and arrow hover behavior
steps.expected: Hover border #242424, focus-within border white/12, arrow hover opacity change without scale
steps.observed: Container hover border rgb(36,36,36); focus border white/12; arrow hover opacity ~0.80 with transform none

steps.action: Check tab spacing and token icon sizing
steps.expected: Tab bar margin-bottom 12px and selector icon 24px
steps.observed: Tab bar marginBottom=12px; USD1 token avatar child measures 24x24

evidence.consoleErrors: Repeated fetch errors: HTTP 429 Too Many Requests from localhost:3100 endpoints during session
evidence.network: GET /market and GET /depth observed while swap panel rendered

assertions.title: Section spacing, breadcrumbs, and typography details correct

steps.action: Validate spacing and typography via computed layout/style checks
steps.expected: Section spacing 24-40px, breadcrumb chevron SVG, breadcrumb 15px, description 19px, link pill 17px white/65
steps.observed: Left-column spacing class is space-y-6 md:space-y-10 and measured section gaps are 40px for major sections; breadcrumb includes SVG chevron at 15px text; description is 19px; link pill is 17px white/65

steps.action: Validate md breakpoint horizontal padding switch
steps.expected: Main content padding x changes at 768px (md)
steps.observed: At 767px main padding is 20px; at 768px main padding is 40px

steps.action: Validate transaction table row padding py-3.5
steps.expected: Renderable transaction rows expose py-3.5 row spacing
steps.observed: Table remained in 'No recent transactions' empty state; only empty-state cell padding (48px) was measurable

evidence.consoleErrors: Repeated fetch errors: HTTP 429 Too Many Requests from localhost:3100 endpoints during session
evidence.network: Only GET /market and GET /depth observed; no transaction payloads surfaced for row-level validation

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing transaction-row prerequisite (persistent API rate limiting/empty transaction feed prevented row padding verification).

frictions.description: Local API repeatedly returned HTTP 429, leaving transactions empty and causing frequent console noise during otherwise visual checks.
`agent-browser errors` output intermittently included repeated 'Unexpected token "P"' parsing messages, while `agent-browser console` provided usable diagnostics.
frictions.resolution: Used `agent-browser console` as primary console evidence source.

blockers.description: Transaction table had no real trade rows due repeated API 429/empty feed, preventing direct verification of py-3.5 row padding.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried through normal page interactions and responsive viewport checks; table remained in empty state.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-FIX-002/003/004), 1 blocked (VAL-FIX-005 row-padding sub-check blocked by missing transaction rows under persistent API 429 conditions).
